mapper.select: SELECT log.year AS year, count(log.year) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.start_dat, 1, 4) AS year FROM xeus.mon_cctv_log log WHERE log.cctv_mgr_no IS NOT NULL ) log GROUP BY log.year ORDER BY log.year

SELECT log.month AS month, count(log.month) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.start_dat, 5, 2) AS month FROM xeus.mon_cctv_log log
log.cctv_mgr_no IS NOT NULL
AND log.start_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.month ORDER BY log.month

SELECT log.day AS day, count(log.day) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.start_dat, 7, 2) AS day FROM xeus.mon_cctv_log log
log.cctv_mgr_no IS NOT NULL
AND log.start_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND log.start_dat LIKE '____'||#{month}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.day ORDER BY log.day

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "00" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "01" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "02" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "03" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "04" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '05' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "05" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '06' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "06" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '07' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "07" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '08' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "08" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '09' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "09" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "10" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '11' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "11" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '12' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "12" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '13' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "13" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '14' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "14" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '15' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "15" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "16" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '17' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "17" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '18' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "18" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '19' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "19" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '20' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "20" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '21' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "21" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '22' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "22" , COALESCE(SUM(CASE hh WHEN '23' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "23" FROM (SELECT use_typ, start_dat, substring(start_dat, 9, 2) AS hh FROM xeus.mon_cctv_log) AS r
use_typ is not null
AND start_dat LIKE #{today}||'%'
